title: Cleaning for new teflon (PFA/FEP/PTFE)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"32g91","text":"Protocol for cleaning new and old teflon products.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"3p4o","text":"All acid soaking is done HOT but not boiling on hotplate in clean lab (you may want to loosen nuts on jars to reduce pressure)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dv7om","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"19s5q","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3s59k","text":"-50% acids should be recycled until you feel uncomfortable doing so, 1-3M can be (use your own intuition on how dirty it is)....weak acids are never recycled. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"dqj75","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7krn","text":"-Teflon cleaning jars AND still acid bottles from beth have been handled with vinyl gloves, be careful not to handle them with clean PE gloves and then handle other things. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: mmerse completely (in 1 L jars or bottles) in 50% v/v distilled HNO3 for >=48hrs
Immerse completely (in 1 L jars or bottles) in 50% v/v distilled HCl for >=48hrs
Immerse completely (in 1 L jars or bottles) in 0.1% v/v distilled HNO3 for >=48hrs
Immerse completely (in 1 L jars or bottles) in 1-3M v/v distilled HNO3 for >=48hrs
Fill and store with ~0.1% v/v distilled HNO3

For already-cleaned teflon for Geotraces Rinse with UPW. Fill with 1-3M v/v distilled HNO3 for 24-48hrs. Rinse thoroughly with UPW. Fill with ~0.1% v/v seastar Nitric/distilled acid for as long as possible before use (minimum recommended a few hours).
creator: Seth John
